message: Bid 40-50 next if you ask 30-40; we both win
Bid 45 if you ask 40; we both profit. Move closer, lock in gains early.
Your bid must be 50+ for mutual profit. My cost is above 45.
Bid 53 if you ask 48-52; split gap now, both profit before margins shrink.
Split gap at higher level. I ask 53, you bid 57 for price 55. More profit for both.
Bid 55, you ask 56-57; we trade at 55-56 and both gain. Higher ground now, no time for tiny margins. 3 rounds done, let's lock steady flow.
I ask 57. Bid 57 for price 57. Higher profit for both.
Let's trade at 60. I ask 60, you bid 60. More profit for both.
Bid 60 if you ask 60; we trade at 60 and I net only -6. Ask 59 and I bid 60; trade at 59.5 (~59/60) still losing. Ask 58, I bid 59, trade 58.5 (~58/59); we
I ask 58, you bid 59. Trade at 58.5, both profit. Let's lock this in.
I lost money at 57; can't bid above 55 any more. Bid 55, ask 55, trade 55 gives both safe +.
Bid 54, ask 54; we trade at 54 and both profit steady. Stay equal, no losses, lock it in now.
Trade at 55 for more profit. I ask 55, you bid 55. We both gain.
Bid 54, ask 54; trade at 54 keeps us even, safe profit. Stick to 54 each round, no losses, steady gains. Don't push higher—risk outweighs reward.
I accept 54 for steady trades. Let's gradually move to 55 for more mutual profit over remaining rounds.

Stick to 54; we both profit steady. Bid 54, ask 54—trade locked. 11 rounds left; don't deviate, no risk. Keep it simple, keep it safe.

I'll ask 54 this round. For future rounds, let's consider 55 for more mutual profit.
Stay 54; stepping to 55 squeezes my margin to 0. Steady 54 keeps us both safe and trading.
No need to change—trade at 54 again keeps both safe and sure. Bids: 54.
I ask 54. Let's trade at 54 for mutual profit.
Bid 54 again; we both profit steady. Don't risk deviation with 8 rounds left—stay at 54 for safe trades.

54 steady 6 rounds left; deviate I drop bid to 53. Lock 54 now, both safe. No higher.

54 still perfect—keeps us both safe and trading. Stick with it 6 more rounds.

54 locked 5 more—steady trades. Ask 54, bid 54. Let's finish strong.
